summary: Implemented an initial PID-file guard in launch_all.py using a launcher.pid file and os.kill(pid, 0) style liveness check.
Verification failed because duplicate launcher instances still started, so the first fix was not sufficient.
result: Second launcher instance also started instead of exiting, so duplicate-launch prevention did not work.
risks: Relative PID file path and Windows os.kill behavior made the original implementation unreliable in this environment.
